creator: andrewhw@ieee.org
text:
In the README.TXT file in the ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/ports on the main ftp site there is still a recommendation to use the csup tool, which should be updated to suggest portsnap instead.

Fix: 

At the very least, the csup line should go.
How-To-Repeat: View the file:

ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/ports/README.TXT
